# Contributing

Welcome — and thanks for checking out InkIt. 🙏

InkIt is **open source, but not open contribution.** The code is here for you to
read, build, learn from, and fork freely under the Apache-2.0 license. Active
development is driven by the Cartesia team, which keeps the direction focused but
does mean we can't take on outside changes the way a fully community-run project
would.

## Pull requests

We're not accepting pull requests right now. It's nothing personal — keeping
development in one place just helps us move quickly and keep the codebase
coherent. If there's a change you'd love to see, the best path is to **fork and
make it your own** — that's exactly what the license is for.

## Found a bug or have feedback?

We'd genuinely love to hear it. Please use the feedback form:

https://forms.gle/jXNtDsTaLt2rKQ8N9

We read everything that comes through. We can't promise to act on every piece of
feedback, but it all helps us understand how InkIt is being used.

Thanks again for being here. 🎉
